item.TDLINE: 1.Kindly maintain DelVal item codes and purchase order numbers on your
2.In case of any discrepancies, please contact DelVal USA Office. If no
response is received within the next 48 hours, we
3.Please send us PI for order acknowledgement against this PO.
4.Please send us a copy of the commercial invoice, packing slip, and
tracking information when this PO material shipping
to us & also emailing them to accounting@delvalflow.com
5.TPI/GAD/QAP documents NOT applicable for this order.
6.Please make sure MTR#s are shipped with the delivery. (Where ever
7.Please make sure to copy accounting@delvalflow.com on all proforma
8. Once this PO material shipped, please send us tracking information
details for our information and record.
9.Error :- clerical errors are subject to correction.
10. Signature :- This is an electronic PO copy. No signature is
